entries.summary: Implement TASK-075 release-state-audit integration: make release-state-audit consume archmap-impact-audit, review-provenance-audit, and evidence-independence-audit, and fill empty command help inputs/outputs where still missing. Verification gate: release-state-audit fails when any v6.7 governance audit fails; command help benchmark remains green; unit tests pass. Stop condition: integration only; no new audit families. QIF boundary: integrated audit pass is structural/runtime release-readiness evidence, not proof of semantic product quality.
